signals.snippet: Subject: Re: Quick catch up\n\nBody: Hi there! I think it’s best that I cancel at this time. On Tue, Feb 3, 2026 at 12:52 PM Sudha Goutami < sudha.g@zoca.com > wrote: Hi Raylene, I hope you're doing well! This is Sudha, your account man

cause_analysis.narrative: SKIN and TONIC Facial Bar churned on 2026-04-05 after 255 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2026-02-04 via email — 60 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made. Median Zoca response time was 8.0 days, above the 24-hour expectation.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 60 day(s) before churn via email. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
